header.title: How we work with you
header.subtitle: Transparent engagement models. Final pricing and timelines follow technical discovery and agreed scope.

disclaimer: Every quote is tailored after we understand your product, users, and constraints—no surprise invoices mid-flight.

plans.title: Discovery & roadmap
plans.lead: Align on goals, users, and constraints before we commit production effort.
plans.footnote: Typically a fixed discovery fee; credited toward build when you proceed.

plans.title: Build & launch
plans.lead: End-to-end product delivery from agreed scope to production release.
bullets: Handover so your team can operate the system
plans.footnote: Project-based or phased contracts; scope changes are agreed in writing.

plans.title: Iterate & support
plans.lead: Ongoing product and engineering capacity after launch.
bullets: Roadmap iterations, new modules, and refinements
plans.footnote: Retainers include a clear definition of capacity and response expectations.
